title: feuilleea harrisii
intro: Feuilleea harrisii, also known as the Chinese yam or Dioscorea harrisii, is a type of perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antidiabetic compounds. The health benefits of feuilleea harrisii include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Feuilleea harrisii can be prepared as a tea, extract, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a variety of health conditions.
